hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == *"/NORMA-AI/normaai-app/"* && "$FILE" != *"/.claude/"* ]]; then cd /Users/user/Documents/PROGETTI/NORMA-AI/normaai-app && export PATH="/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" && git add -A -- ':!.claude' && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push origin main); fi
